items.title: Algorithms for Data Analysis: Lomb Scargle Periodograms
items.description: In this talk, we aim to provide an intuitive understanding of Lomb-Scargle Periodograms and how it is applied to Astronomical Data using Python and try to find an exoplanet from the data collected by the TESS telescope.

items.title: Space Mission Series: Mars 2020
items.description: A talk I gave at the Astrophysics Club at IISER Tirupati during my first year on the Mars 2020 Mission
